NordStern
Stellar anchor infrastructure

Become a Stellar anchor.
Skip the stack.

Bring your liquidity and licence. NordStern runs the SEP servers, KYC, keys, and payment rails — and spins up a fully isolated anchor for you in minutes.

Testnet only · no card · no real money

⚙️

SEP servers, run for you

SEP-1/10/12/24 on the Stellar Anchor Platform — discovery, auth, KYC, and hosted deposit/withdrawal. You never touch the protocol.

🛡️

Isolated per anchor

Every anchor you create gets its own stack, subdomain, keys, asset, and database. No shared blast radius.

🪪

Pluggable KYC

Identity verification behind a clean seam — mock by default, surepass (India) in sandbox, more providers on the way.

🔑

Keys encrypted at rest

Signing, distribution, and issuer seeds are generated and sealed in an encrypted vault — never stored in plaintext.

From sign-up to live anchor

The whole point: you register, and you watch the infrastructure assemble itself.

1

Create your operator account

One login. From it you create and manage every anchor you run.

2

Name an anchor & pick KYC

Give it a name, choose a KYC provider. That’s the whole form.

3

Watch it provision live

Keypairs, testnet funding, asset issuance, config, containers, health — streamed to your screen.

4

Go live on its own domain

Your anchor answers SEP requests at its own subdomain. Wallets can connect immediately.

NordSternBuilt on Stellar · SEP-24 · Testnet
